torp 1.1.0
  • Reference

Package index

Data Loading

Load processed AFL data from torpdata GitHub releases

load_chains()
Load Chains Data
load_ep_wp_charts()
Load EP/WP Chart Data
load_fixtures()
Load AFL Fixture Data
load_injury_data()
Load Injury Data from GitHub Releases
load_pbp()
Load Play By Play Data
load_player_details()
Load AFL Player Details Data
load_player_game_data()
Load Player Game Data
load_player_game_ratings()
Load Player Game Ratings Data
load_player_season_ratings()
Load Player Season Ratings Data
load_player_stat_ratings() load_player_skills()
Load Player Stat Ratings Data
load_player_stats()
Load Player Stats Data
load_predictions()
Load AFL Match Predictions Data
load_preseason_injuries()
Load Preseason Injury List
load_psr()
Load Player Skill Ratings (PSR)
load_results()
Load AFL Match Results Data
load_retrodictions()
Load Retrodictions Data
load_team_ratings()
Load Team Ratings Data
load_teams()
Load AFL Team and Lineup Data
load_torp_ratings()
Load TORP Ratings Data
load_weather()
Load Weather Data
load_xg()
Load Expected Goals (xG) Data
fixtures
AFL Season Fixtures

Prediction Models

Add expected points, win probability, and shot predictions to play-by-play data

add_epv_vars()
Add Expected Points Value (EPV) Variables
add_wp_vars()
Add Win Probability Variables
add_shot_vars()
Add Shot Variables

Data Cleaning

Clean and prepare AFL data for analysis

clean_pbp()
Clean Play-by-Play Data

Player Ratings

Calculate and view TORP player ratings

calculate_epr_stats()
Calculate EPR statistics per player
calculate_torp()
Calculate TORP (Total Over Replacement Predictive-value)
calculate_psr_components()
Calculate PSR with Offensive/Defensive Decomposition
calculate_psv()
Calculate Player Stat Value (PSV) from Per-Game Stats
calculate_psv_components()
Calculate PSV with Offensive/Defensive Decomposition
torp_ratings()
TORP Ratings (Total Over Replacement Predictive-value)
calculate_epr()
Calculate EPR (Expected Possession Rating)
epr_ratings()
EPR Ratings (Expected Possession Rating)
psr_ratings()
PSR Ratings (Player Skill Rating)
player_game_ratings()
Get game ratings
player_season_ratings()
Get season total ratings
player_profile()
Get a Player Profile
print(<torp_player_profile>)
Print a player profile
create_player_game_data()
Create Player Game Data
create_wp_credit()
Create Win Probability Credit Data
calculate_psr()
Calculate Player Skill Ratings (PSR)
team_profile()
Get a Team Profile
print(<torp_team_profile>)
Print a team profile

Player Stat Ratings

Estimate and explore player stat rating profiles

aggregate_team_stat_ratings() aggregate_team_skills()
Aggregate player stat ratings to team level
estimate_player_stat_ratings() estimate_player_skills()
Estimate player stat ratings using Bayesian conjugate priors
get_player_stat_ratings() get_player_skills()
Get player stat rating estimates from pre-computed data
player_stat_rating_profile() player_skill_profile()
Get a player's stat rating profile with percentile ranks
print(<torp_stat_rating_profile>) print(<torp_skill_profile>)
Print a player stat rating profile
get_team_stat_ratings() get_team_skills()
Get Team Stat Ratings
team_stat_rating_profile() team_skill_profile()
Get a Team Stat Rating Profile
print(<torp_team_stat_rating_profile>) print(<torp_team_skill_profile>)
Print a team stat rating profile

Season Simulation

Simulate AFL seasons and predict match outcomes

simulate_afl_season()
Simulate a full AFL season
simulate_season()
Simulate a season of games
summarise_simulations()
Summarise simulation results
show_predictions()
Show TORP Match Predictions
print(<torp_sim_results>)
Print simulation results
ladder
AFL Season Simulation System
calculate_ladder()
Calculate AFL ladder from game results
calculate_final_ladder()
Calculate expected final ladder from actual results + predictions

Chain Analysis

Access and analyse possession chains

get_match_chains()
Get Match Chains
load_chains()
Load Chains Data
extract_contests()
Extract Head-to-Head Contests from Chains Data

Match Analysis

Match-level expected goals, predictions, and head-to-head comparisons

get_player_game_ratings()
Get Player Game Ratings (Live)
get_xg()
Get Live xG for a Match or Round
calculate_match_xgs() match_xgs()
Calculate xGs for AFL Matches
head_to_head()
Head-to-Head Contest History Between Two Players
print(<torp_head_to_head>)
Print Head-to-Head Results

Model Validation

Evaluate model performance, calibration, and drift

Caching

In-memory and disk caching utilities

clear_data_cache()
Clear Data Cache
clear_model_cache()
Clear Model Cache
clear_all_cache()
Clear All Caches
clear_disk_cache()
Clear Disk Cache
get_cache_info()
Get Cache Information
get_disk_cache_info()
Get Disk Cache Information
get_disk_cache_size()
Get Disk Cache Size
get_model_cache_info()
Get Model Cache Info
set_disk_cache_options()
Set Disk Cache Options

Constants

AFL and model constants

AFL_TEAMS
Canonical AFL team lookup table
AFL_TEAM_ALIASES
Named vector mapping team name variants to canonical names

Injuries

Injury data access, matching, and simulation scheduling

injuries
AFL Injury Data Functions
get_all_injuries()
Get All Injuries (Weekly + Preseason)
match_injuries()
Match Injuries to a Ratings Data Frame
scrape_injuries()
Scrape AFL Weekly Injury List
build_injury_schedule()
Build Injury Return Schedule for Simulation
load_injury_data()
Load Injury Data from GitHub Releases

Utilities

Helper and convenience functions

get_afl_season()
Get AFL Season
get_afl_week()
Get AFL Week
set_torp_data_repo()
Set TORP Data Repository
setup_torp_logging()
Setup TORP Logging Configuration
download_torp_data()
Download TORP Data for Local Storage
get_local_data_dir()
Get Local Data Directory
save_locally()
Save Data Frame Locally in torpdata/data/
set_local_data_dir()
Set Local Data Directory
torp_replace_teams()
Standardise AFL Team Names
torp_team_abbr()
Get AFL Team Abbreviation
torp_team_full()
Get AFL Team Full Name
torp_replace_venues()
Standardise AFL Venue Names

AFL API

Access AFL data directly from the API

get_afl_fixtures()
Fetch AFL Fixtures
get_afl_lineups()
Fetch AFL Lineups
get_afl_player_details()
Fetch AFL Player Details
get_afl_player_stats()
Fetch AFL Player Stats
get_afl_results()
Fetch AFL Results
get_afl_ladder()
Fetch AFL Ladder (Current Standings)

Internal / Developer

Internal utilities accessible via torp::: for model training and data scraping

access_api()
Access API
get_players()
Get Players
get_round_games()
Get Round Games
get_season_games()
Get Season Games
select_shot_model_vars()
Select Shot Model Variables
predict_shot_probabilities()
Predict Shot Probabilities

On this page
